chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA 1st. Criminal Bail Application No.S- 93 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on M.A.No.964/2025 (U/A). 2. For order on office objection “A”. 3. For order on M.A No.965/2025 (E/A). 4. For hearing of bail application. 21.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Advocate for the applicant a/w applicant. ------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. Applicants Sajjad Ali Baloch, is admitted to protective bail for a period of ten days in Crime No.76/2003 registered under Sections 447,448,427, 34 PPC, registered at Police Station, Saryab, District Quetta, Province of Balochistan, in order to approach the Trial Court and surrender before it without apprehension of being arrested on his way. This Order is subject to the Applicant's furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees Ten Thousands only) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned Additional Registrar of this Court. This Order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of period of ten days i.e. on 02.03.2025 or on the Applicant's surrendering himself before the concerned trial court whichever is earlier. The operation of NBWs if any, issued against the applicant shall remain suspended till then. The bail application stands disposed of. J U D G E
